testcase.name: ninguna_interfaz_acaba_en_impl
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'classes that are interfaces should have simple name containing 'Impl'' was violated (17 times): Class
